CVE-2025-30472.title: Corosync through 3.1.9, if encryption is disabled or the attacker ...
CVE-2025-30472.description: Corosync through 3.1.9, if encryption is disabled or the attacker knows the encryption key, has a stack-based buffer overflow in orf_token_endian_convert in exec/totemsrp.c via a large UDP packet.
